zh.lifeSummary: 當Valentine Barret於大約1367年出生在英國英格蘭肯特法維沙安時，他的父親Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham31歲，母親Jane Empson48歲。他與Cecilia de Leigh在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年11月20日享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特法維沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Barret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Matthieu, Mirlande, Philippe.

French: derivative of the topographic name   Barre   1 ‘barrier’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 3 below) is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Barrette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Jacques, Antoine, Armand, Pierre, Aldor, Andre, Elmire, Eudore, Luc, Marcel, Marcellin.
French Canadian: altered form of Barette or Barret 3, both altered forms of French Baret . The ending -tte reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
French: from the feminine form of   Barret   2.

variants.name: Barrett
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Old French barat, Middle English bar(r)at, bar(r)et(te) ‘trouble, distress’, later ‘deception, fraud; contention, strife’. Through Norman settlement it also became common in Ireland, where it was Gaelicized as Baróid (Munster) and Baréid (Connacht).

variants.name: Baret
meanings: derivative of the ancient Germanic personal name Baro, from ber(o) ‘bear’.

nameMeanings.name: Valentine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Latin name Valentinus, a derivative of valens ‘healthy, strong’. This was the name of a Roman martyr of the 3rd century, whose feast is celebrated on 14 February . This was the date of a pagan fertility festival marking the first stirrings of spring, which has survived in an attenuated form under the patronage of the saint.

en.lifeSummary: When Valentine Barret was born about 1367, in Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham, was 31 and his mother, Jane Empson, was 48. He married Cecilia de Leigh in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 20 November 1440, at the age of 74, and was buried in Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Valentine Barret est né environ 1367, à Faversham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Jane Empson, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia de Leigh à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 novembre 1440, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Faversham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Little Chart, Kent, England, United King: Little Chart, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Valentine Barret um 1367 in Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham 31 und seine Mutter Jane Empson 48. Er hat in Kent, England Cecilia de Leigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. November 1440 im Alter von 74 Jahren und wurde in Faversham, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Valentine Barret è nato il circa 1367 nel Faversham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Jane Empson, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia de Leigh nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 novembre 1440, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Faversham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Valentine Barretが約1367年にイギリスイギリスケントファバーシャムで生まれた時，父Sir William Barrett Of Chipperhamは31歳，母Jane Empsonは48歳であった。イギリスケントでCecilia de Leighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年11月20日に74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントファバーシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Valentine Barret(이)가 대략 1367년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 파버샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Empson(은)는 48세였다. 그는 영국 켄트에서 Cecilia de Leigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 11월 20일 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 파버샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Valentine Barret nasceu aproximadamente 1367, em Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Jane Empson, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia de Leigh em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1440, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Valentine Barret родился около 1367 г. в местности фавиршам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Barrett Of Chipperham было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Empson, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia de Leigh в местности кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 ноября 1440 г. в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности фавиршам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Cecilia de Leigh en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
